name: Aces & Eights
fourPc:
Dead Man's Hand

Flip a card when landing shots with a Rifle or Marksman rifle. 

After 5 cards are flipped, the damage of your next shot is amplified by 30%. 
More shots are enhanced the better the hand revealed. 

Four of a Kind: 4 shots
Full House: 3 shots
Aces and Eights: 2 shots. 

Flip an additional card on headshots.
chest:
No Limit

Increases Dead Man's Hand damage bonus 
from 30% to 50%.
chestDesc:
Ace in the Sleeve

Amplifies 1 extra shot when revealing your hand

name: Aegis
fourPc:
Stoic

Get +4% Damage Resistance for every enemy that is targeting you.

The bonus is multiplied by 1.X, where X is the number of agents in your group.
chest:
Deceit

Enemies targeting your Decoy also count towards the Stoic Damage Reduction bonus.
chestDesc:
Polyethylene Plating

Increase Stoic Damage Resistance bonus from 4% to 5%.

name: Breaking Point
fourPc:
On Point

Hitting a shot with a rifle or MMR grants 1 stack, max stack equal to magazine size. 
Reloading grants 2% handling and 4% WD per stack for 10s. No stacks gained while bonuses are active. 
Once timer runs out magazine is refilled. Reloading will stop effect. 
Reloading with stacks while inactive will remove all stacks and refill magazine
chest:
Point of no Return

Increase on point bonuses timer from 10s - 15s
chestDesc:
Point of honor 

Increases On Point Weapon Damage bonus from 4 to 7.2.

name: Cavalier
fourPc:
Charging

For each second spent out of cover during combat, Agents will get 5% reduced incoming skill damage. Max 50%

Charged

While fully charged, gain immunity to any movement speed debuff and share this with all of the agents hazard protection and the incoming skill damage with all allies for 10 seconds.

After Charged is consumed, Charging buff will resume if still in combat and out of cover!
chest:
Overcharging:

Increases Charger max incoming damage protection to 70%
chestDesc:
Safe Charging:

Charging gives 10% protection per second.

name: Concentrated Company
fourPc:
Camaraderie

Shooting an enemy marks them for 7 seconds.

When a marked enemy dies, receive one stack of 3% Weapon Damage and 2% Critical Hit Damage for each Ally or Skill that has contributed to killing that enemy.

Max stacks is 35. Stacks decay every 10 seconds.
Maximum amount of marks that can be placed is 4.
chest:
All for One

Increase the amount of marks that can be placed from 4 to 8.
chestDesc:
One for All

Increase the Weapon Damage bonus per stack from 3% to 5%.
backpackDesc:
Additive to 
All Weapon Damage and Critical Hit Damage

name: Eclipse Protocol
fourPc:
Indirect Transmission

On kill:
> Spread status effects of that enemy to all enemies within 10m
> Refresh 50% of status effect durations
chest:
Proliferation

Increases Indirect Transmission range 
from 10m to 15m

Increases refresh percentage from
50% to 75%.
chestDesc:
Symptom Aggravator

Amplifies all damage you deal to 
status affected targets by 30%

name: Foundry Bulwark
fourPc:
Makeshift Repairs

Whenever you or your shield take damage,
25% of that amount is repaired to both over 10s.
chest:
Improved Materials

Decreases time taken for Makeshift Repairs
from 10s to 5s.
chestDesc:
Process Refinery

Increases Makeshift Repairs from 25% over 10s
to 35% over 10s

name: Future Initiative
fourPc:
Ground Control

Increases you and your allies' total weapon and skill damage
by 15% when at full armor.

When you repair an ally, you and all allies within 5m of you
are also repaired for 60% of that amount.
chest:
Tactical Superiority

Increases Ground Control damage bonus
from 15% to 25%
chestDesc:
Advanced Combat Tactics

Increases Ground Control proximity repair
from 60% to 120%

name: Hard Wired
fourPc:
Feedback Loop

Whenever you use or cancel a skill, 
> your other skill's cooldown is reduced by 30s 
> total skill repair is increased by 10% for 20s.
> total skill damage is increased by 10% for 20s.

Cooldown: 10s.
chest:
Positive Reinforcement

Increases Feedback Loop skill damage 
and repair bonus from +10% to +25%
chestDesc:
Short Circuit

Decreases Feedback Loop cooldown from 10s to 5s.

name: Heartbreaker
fourPc:
Heartstopper

Headshots apply pulse 5s.
Weapon hits on pulsed enemies add and refreshes a stack of +1% bonus armor and +1.1% weapon damage to pulsed enemies for 5s. Max stack is 50.

Two stacks are lost per second.
chest:
Max BPM

Max stack is now 100.
chestDesc:
Cold

Stacks now supply +2% bonus armor
backpackDesc:
Separate Multiplier, stacks additively

(1 + 0.011 * n), n being number of stacks

n max is 50 without chest
n max is 100 with chest

name: Hotshot
fourPc:
Headache

First Headshot with a Marksman Rifle will increase next headshot by 20%, second consecutive headshot with a Marksman Rifle will give +10% armor (if at full armor it will give bonus armor max +50% of current armor value), third consecutive headshot will refill magazine. 

From the fourth headshot forward agents will get all 3 bonuses for each consecutive headshot kill. Missing a headshot will reset the cycle
chest:
Stand Tall 

Increases bonus Armor from 50% to 100%
chestDesc:
Lucky

Agents can miss a headshot before resetting the cycle

name: Hunter's Fury
fourPc:
Apex Predator

Enemies within 15m receive a debuff, amplifying your weapon damage against them by +20%. 

Killing a debuffed enemy with your weapon disorients other enemies within 5m, and amplifies weapon damage by 5% for 10s, 
stacking up to 5 times.
chest:
Endless Hunger

Increases the duration of Apex Predator stacks from 10s to 30s.
chestDesc:
Overwhelming Force

 Increases the radius of disorient on Apex Predator kills from 5m to 10m.
backpackDesc:
Weapon damage amplifier towards enemies within 15m

On kill stacking buff is self multiplicative weapon damage amplifier
1.05 ^ n
n ranges from 0 to 5

name: Measured Assembly
fourPc:
Huddle

Recieve +1 Skill Tier for each ally Agent that is within the range of the hive or Smart Cover. While at Skill Tier 6, having at least one ally Agent in the range of your Hive or Smart Cover for 4s will grant Overcharge for 15s Cooldown: 40s

Mortars and enemy Skills that enter the range of your Hive or Smart Cover will be destroyed. cooldown 10s. The cooldown is 20% faster for each ally agent within the range of your hive or smart cover.
chest:
Hivemind

 Decrease the Overcharge cooldown from 40 to 25.
chestDesc:
Smart Cooperation

Decrease the cooldown for destroying Mortars and enemy skills from 10 to 1

name: Negotiator's Dilemma
fourPc:
Crowd Control

Critical hits mark enemies for 20s, up to 3 marks total. 

When you critically hit a marked enemy, all other marked enemies
take 60% of the damage dealt. 

Whenever a marked enemy dies, gain +2% critical hit damage,
stacking up to 20 times, or until combat ends.
chest:
Target Rich Environment

Increases Crowd Control mark count 
from 3 to 5.
chestDesc:
Critical Measures

Increases Crowd Control damage to 
additional marked enemies from 60% to 112%.

name: Ongoing Directive
fourPc:
Rules of Engagement

Shooting a status affected enemy will apply a mark.

Killing a marked enemy grants a full clip of Hollow-Point Ammo for your active weapon, and half a clip of the agent's active weapon to the rest of the party.

Marklast for 10 Seconds.

Hollow-Point Ammo amplifies weapon damage by 20% and applies bleed on hit.
chest:
Parabellum Rounds

Increases Hollow-Point Ammo weapon damage amplification to 50%

Does not effect party ammo.
chestDesc:
Trauma Specialist

Increases duration of bleed status effects by 50% all bleed damage done by 100%

name: Ortiz: Exuro
fourPc:
Ortiz Incinerator Turret Prototype

The Incinerator Turret spins 360°. You are immune to your own Incinerator Turret's fire. The Incinerator Turret explodes when disabled.
chest:
Chain Combustion

Enemies set ablaze by the Ortiz Incinerator Turret Prototype ignite other enemies within 2m.
chestDesc:
Heatstroke

+25% Weapon Damage to enemies set on fire by the Ortiz Incinerator Turret Prototype.

+25% Ortiz Incinerator Turret Prototype Range.

name: Refactor
fourPc:
Return to Sender

For PvE: Receive repairs of 10% of the damage dealt by your Skills. Your allies will receive repairs of 20% of the damage dealt by your Skills.

For PvP: Receive repairs of 5% of the damage dealt by your Skills. Your allies will receive repairs of 10% of the damage dealt by your Skills.
chest:
Increased Interest

For PvE: Increase the repairs received from Return to Sender from 10% to 25%, and from 20% to 35%

For PvP: Increase the repairs received from Return to Sender from 5% to 15%, and from 10% to 20%
chestDesc:
Over-engineered

While at full Armor, repairs received from Return to Sender will provide Bonus Armor, up to 80% of your Total Armor. Does not apply to allies.

name: Rigger
fourPc:
Tend and Befriend

Interacting with your deployed skills grants the skill 25% skill damage for 10s. This buff cannot be refreshed.

Interactions include:
Using / Deploying the Skill
Changing the skills target
Healing the skill
chest:
Best Buds

Increase the damage buff from 25% to 50%
chestDesc:
Complete Uptime

Cancelling your skills will reset their cooldown.

name: Striker's Battlegear
fourPc:
Striker's Gamble

Weapon hits increase total weapon damage by 0.65%, stacking up to 100 times. 1 stacks lost per second between 0 to 50 stacks; 2 stacks lost per second between 51 and 100 stacks.
chest:
Press the Advantage

Increases max stacks for Striker’s Gamble from 100 to 200. 3 stacks lost per second between 101 and 200 stacks.
chestDesc:
Risk Management

Increases total weapon damage gained per stack of Striker’s Gamble from 0.65% to .9%.
backpackDesc:
Amplifier, stacks additively

(1 + 0.0065 * n) without backpack
(1 + 0.0090 * n) with backpack

n ranges from 1 to 100, or 1 to 200 with chest

name:
System Corruption
(Dark Zone Exclusive)
fourPc:
Hackstep Protocol

Replaces armor kits with an instant, infinite-use ability.

> Grants 50% bonus armor for 5s
> Hides your nameplate for 5s. 
> Repairs 20% of your armor
> Increases total weapon damage by 2% per 5% 
bonus armor gained, up to 20% 

Ability cooldown: 20s
chest:
Compiler Optimization

Decreases Hackstep Protocol cooldown 
from 20s to 15s.
chestDesc:
Multithreaded Execution

Increases Hackstep Protocol bonus armor
from 50% to 100%.
backpackDesc: Functions as an amp.applies to skills, melee and grenades, bullets.

name: Tip of the Spear
fourPc:
Aggressive Recon

Getting a Signature Weapon kill gives +15%. Signature Weapon Damage for 10s and +25% Reload Speed for the next reload of the weapon (the bonuses do not stack).

Automatically regenerate Signature Weapon Ammo every 60s.
chest:
Specialized Destruction

Increase Aggressive Recon Signature Weapon Damage bonus from 15% to 30%. 
Every 3rd Signature Weapon kill generates Signature Weapon ammo.
chestDesc:
Signature Moves

+50% Weapon Damage for 15s after fully depleting the Signature Weapon of ammo.

Doubles the amount of ammo generated by Aggressive Recon.
backpackDesc:
Total Weapon damage

Spec Weapon Amplifier

name: Tipping Scales
fourPc:
Throttle Control

    Shooting builds stacks to a max of 50. Each stack provides +0.5% Weapon Handling and +4% Critical Hit Damage.

    Lose 6 stacks per second while not shooting. No stacks are lost if an enemy is Suppressed.
chest:
Sustainability

Increase the maximum number of stacks from 50 to 75.
chestDesc:
Snowball

Increase the Critical Hit Damage received per stack from 4% to 7%.

name: True Patriot
fourPc:
Red, White and Blue

Enemies you shoot receive stacking debuffs of Red/White/Blue.
Changes every 2 seconds.

Red: Amplifies the enemy's damage taken by 8%. 
White: Hitting the enemy restores you and your allies' armor by 2%
once every second
Blue: Decreases enemy damage dealt by 8%.

Full Flag: Enemies that die while under the effect of all three debuffs
create a 5m explosion, dealing damage equal to their total health and armor. 
Explosion strength is reduced on Named enemy deaths.
chest:
Waving the Flag

Increases Red, White, and Blue rotation speed 
to 1.5 seconds.
chestDesc:
Patriotic Boost

Increases Red, White, and Blue debuff strength. 

Red: From 8% to 12%
White: From 2% to 3%
Blue: From 8% to 12%.

name: Umbra Initiative
fourPc:
From the Shadows Into the Light

From the Shadows: While out of cover and in combat, gain 10 Stacks per second up to 50. Each stack will give 0.8% Armor regen when it is consumed. Stacks consume, 10 stacks per second, only in cover.

Into the Light: While in cover, gain 10 Stacks per second up to 50. Each stack will give 1.2% Critical damage increase and 0.4% RPM. Buff does not apply while shooting from cover. While out of cover Agents lose 2 stacks per second at normal speed and 1 stack per second if sprinting.
chest:
From the Shadows

Increases Max stacks For Into the Light from 50 to 100, stack gain from 10 to 20 and stack consumption from 10 to 20. 
(buffs the damage talent)
chestDesc:
Into the Light

Increases Max stacks From the Shadows from 50 to 100, stack gain from 10 to 20.
(buffs the armor regen talent)
backpackDesc:
Critical Hit Damage 
and
Rate of Fire

name: Virtuoso
fourPc:
Symphony

Kills Beyond 25 Meters: +40% Weapon Damage to Shotguns, SMGs, and Pistols; +20% Weapon Damage to Assault Rifles and LMGs; and +25% Bonus Armor for 15s.

Kills Within 25 Meters: +40% Weapon Damage to Marksman Rifles and Rifles; +20% Weapon Damage to Assault Rifles and LMGs; and +30% Headshot Damage for 15s.

Intermittently killing enemies from both ranges builds up stacks. At 4 stacks, all bonuses are multiplied by 1.5 and triggered simultaneously for 15s. No stacks gained while talent is active.
chest:
Fortissimo

Double the weapon dmg bonus from symphony
chestDesc:
Accelerando 

decreases the number of stacks needed to proc the symphony double buffs from 4 to 3.
